name: Red,white & Blue American Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the 10-inch pie pastry and let cool to room temperature.
2. Pour the blueberry pie filling into the shell; refrigerate for 30 minutes.
3. Beat the cream cheese and powdered sugar until smooth.
4. Fold in the whipped topping.
5. Spread the cheese mixture over the blueberry pie filling; refrigerate for 30 minutes.
6. Spread the cherry pie filling over the cheese mixture.
7. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours before serving.
8. Yields one 10-inch pie.
